title: Peach module
description:
Peach_module. A texture pack that will change your totem and sound to a famous character.
In Russian and English.
body:
This texture pack is made in 2 languages: Russian and English.

Changes in the texture pack:
- New totem model
- New sounds
- Changes in subtitles
- Totem particles
- Changed the achievement about the totem


If he writes that for a newer version, then just don't pay attention, the texture pack will work.
